name: Milestone: Environmental Breakthrough
description: A rare alignment of knowledge, luck, and circumstance allows the caravan to permanently reshape one aspect of the world ahead. Choose which environmental factor to improve forever.

effects.message: The very ground becomes more stable and fertile. Land danger is permanently reduced.
A gentle climate pattern settles in. Temperature extremes are permanently softened.
Rainfall grows more reliable. Drought and flood dangers are permanently lessened.
Edible plants begin to flourish along the route. Vegetation safety is permanently improved.
Background radiation levels drop. The land is permanently cleansed of a subtle poison.
Natural formations offer better cover. Shelter quality is permanently increased.
